ddls:
CREATE TABLE "phrases" (
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phrase */,
  "klingon_text" TEXT /* Klingon text of the phrase */,
  "translation" TEXT /* Translation of the phrase in a human language */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the phrase is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phrase was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phrase was last updated */,
  "cultural_context" TEXT /* Cultural context in which the phrase is used */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the phrase (e.g., literature, film, oral tradition) */,
  "usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Usage frequency of the phrase */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the phrase */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the phrase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phrase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phrases_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phrases_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 language code */,
  "script" TEXT /* Script or writing system used for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phrase_translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phrase being translated */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language of the translation */,
  "translation_text" TEXT /* Translated text of the phrase */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the translation */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the translation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phrase_translations_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phrase_translations_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phrase_translations_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phrase_translations_phrase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phrase_id") REFERENCES phrases ("phrase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phrase_categories" (
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phrase */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phrase_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography or description of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the collection is private or public */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_phrases" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phrase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id", "phrase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phrase being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_phrase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phrase_id") REFERENCES phrases ("phrase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examples" (
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each example */,
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phrase being exemplified */,
  "example_text" TEXT /* Text of the example */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the example */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the example */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the example is used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examples_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examples_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examples_phrase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phrase_id") REFERENCES phrases ("phrase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderations" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation event */,
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phrase being moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator */,
  "moderation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the moderation occurred */,
  "moderation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the moderation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the moderation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderations_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderations_phrase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phrase_id") REFERENCES phrases ("phrase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phrase_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phrase being versioned */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phrase_history_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phrase_history_phrase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phrase_id") REFERENCES phrases ("phrase_id")
)
